zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Huckins於1671年10月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波時，她的父親John Huckins22歲，母親Hope Chipman19歲。她於1695年1月4日與John Lewis在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1741年7月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Huckins于1671年10月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波时，她的父亲John Huckins22岁，母亲Hope Chipman19岁。她于1695年1月4日与John Lewis在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1741年7月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Huckins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Oxfordshire): from a pet form of the personal name Hew or How, with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Hugh ).

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Huckins was born on 1 October 1671, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Huckins, was 22 and her mother, Hope Chipman, was 19. She married John Lewis on 4 January 1695, in Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 July 1741, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Huckins est née le 1 octobre 1671, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Huckins, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hope Chipman, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Lewis le 4 janvier 1695, à Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 juillet 1741, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Huckins am 1. Oktober 1671 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Huckins 22 und ihre Mutter Hope Chipman 19. Sie hat am 4. Januar 1695 in Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten John Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Juli 1741 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Huckins è nata il il 1 ottobre 1671 nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Huckins, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Hope Chipman, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Lewis il 4 gennaio 1695, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Huckinsが1671年10月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父John Huckinsは22歳，母Hope Chipmanは19歳であった。1695年1月4日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルでJohn Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1741年7月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Huckins(이)가 1671년 10월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Huckins(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hope Chipman(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1695년 1월 4일 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일에서 John Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1741년 7월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Huckins nasceu em 1 de outubro de 1671, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Huckins, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hope Chipman, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Lewis em 4 de janeiro de 1695, em Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de julho de 1741, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Huckins родилась 1 октября 1671 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Huckins было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hope Chipman, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lewis 4 января 1695 г. в местности барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 июля 1741 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Huckins nació el 1 de octubre de 1671, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Huckins, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Hope Chipman, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Lewis el 4 de enero de 1695, en Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1741, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
